text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Today felt pretty easy... I'm still in great shape,
so maybe...)
choice_data_list: Why don't we try one more run?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I was about to say the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: On that day... I had a dream.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I dreamed of becoming a comet with a blue tail.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I was flying through the dark galaxy, leaving a
trail of stardust behind me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I dreamed that I flew until all my energy burned
out.
